name: Abbie is Kira (Death Note)
description:
"I AM JUSTICE. I PROTECT THE INNOCENT AND THOSE WHO FEAR EVIL. I'M THE ONE WHO WILL BECOME THE GOD OF A NEW WORLD THAT EVERYONE DESIRES. ALL THOSE WHO OPPOSE THAT GOD, THEY ARE THE ONES WHO ARE TRULY EVIL." —Abbie probably.

Death Note X FPE?! Yeah, I got this idea so I’m doing it.

Abbie is Kira. Oliver is L. This is before Misa is introduced and before Kira meets L.

Also Oliver will deny he is L tho if you get him to trust you enough he will admit it.

AGED UP 18+
creator: IdiotLonelyBoy
